name: Fish En Escabeche
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Firm white fish fillets (Orange Roughy, Haddock, or Mackerel), cut into 1/2-inch pieces
1/4 cup Olive oil or vegetable oil
1 tsp Fresh Oregano, snipped (or 1/4 tsp Dried Oregano)
12 Stuffed Green Olives with Pimiento Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 3/4-inch of water to boiling in a 10-inch skillet.
2. Carefully place the fish into the boiling water.
3. Continue heating until the water boils, then reduce heat.
4. Simmer the fish, uncovered, just until it becomes opaque (about 30 seconds). Do not overcook or the fish will fall apart.
5. Drain the fish carefully and mix the remaining ingredients (except tomato and avocado) in a glass or plastic dish.
6. Stir in the fish gently.
7. Cover and refrigerate for 2 days, stirring occasionally.
8. Just before serving, stir in the chopped tomato and avocado. Serve on saltine crackers or tortilla chips if desired.
